controls.acquisition_transport_count_evidence_lim: The bounded acquisition run recorded 14 attempts and zero retries; offline artifacts independently establish 13 cached raw responses plus one uncached failure-ledger outcome, but do not reconstruct transport retry history.

boris.evidence_limit: reused reviewed local client constant; metadata bytes were not fetched

source_licenses.stooq: not evaluated because every response was an HTML challenge
source_licenses.wiki: Unknown; private/internal-only; redistribution and public publication blocked

disposition.finding: Boris adjusted OHLC closely follows frozen WIKI adjusted OHLC over 721+ sessions and is consistent with WIKI around the 2015-11-10 close anomaly. This identifies a candidate EODHD raw-close anomaly, not independent confirmation of an EODHD defect: Boris lacks issuer metadata, its upstream provider independence is not established, and its raw adjustment inverse is unavailable.
disposition.next_step: Seek an issuer-bound raw close for 2015-11-10 before any one-row repair.

boris.adjustment_basis: adjusted OHLCV inferred from close relation to WIKI adj_close; raw basis unavailable
boris.identity_basis: frozen ticker file plus long date overlap; no issuer metadata in file
boris.license_evidence: existing reviewed local v3 client constant; no new metadata HTTP call

yahoo.adjustment_basis: indicators.quote raw OHLCV; adjclose never used
yahoo.reason: Ticker metadata resolves to a different issuer/instrument.

disposition.finding: Stooq returned only an HTML challenge and Boris supplied no valid price file; Yahoo is incomplete or a reused issuer/ETF, leaving only EODHD versus WIKI.
disposition.next_step: Retain the exact mismatch until another issuer-bound raw provider is available.

boris.note: The first-run fetcher raised before preserving the HTTPError body. Retrying this URL is forbidden by the 14-attempt contract, so raw bytes and SHA-256 remain unavailable and this evidence is rejected.
